prompt.text: If I ___ (have) a lot of money, I would help my friends.

items.hintDe: Im if-Satz steht die Vergangenheit (Past simple) – auch wenn die Situation nur vorgestellt ist.
items.explainDe: Nach if kommt hier das Past simple: have wird zu had. Das zeigt, dass die Situation unwirklich ist.

prompt.text: If I ___ (be) you, I would talk to the teacher.

items.hintDe: Für einen Rat sagst du immer 'If I were you …' – mit were, nicht was.
items.explainDe: In der festen Wendung 'If I were you' nimmst du were. was hörst du zwar auch, were ist hier aber die richtige Form.

prompt.text: If I were you, I ___ (talk) to the teacher about it.

items.hintDe: Im Hauptsatz steht would (oder 'd) + Grundform.
items.explainDe: Der Hauptsatz braucht would + Grundform: would talk. Kurzform: I'd talk.

prompt.text: If she ___ (be) a bad coach, I ___ (find) a new one.

items.hintDe: if + Vergangenheit, dann would + Grundform.
items.explainDe: if-Satz im Past simple (were), Hauptsatz mit would + Grundform (would find). So baust du diese Sätze.
items.note: from SB example 'If she wasn't a good coach, I would find another team'; team avoided as untaught

prompt.text: If we ___ (not / live) so near the school, we ___ (ride) a scooter.

items.hintDe: Die Verneinung im if-Satz: didn't + Grundform.
items.explainDe: Verneinung im if-Satz: didn't live (nicht 'wouldn't live'). Im Hauptsatz steht would ride.

prompt.text: What ___ you ___ (do) if you ___ (find) money on the street?

items.hintDe: Frage: would + Person + Grundform, und im if-Satz die Vergangenheit.
items.explainDe: In der Frage steht would you do …, und der if-Satz steht im Past simple: found. find wird zu found.
items.note: iconic textbook dilemma; found glossed (irregular past untaught)

prompt.text: If I ___ (can / fly), I ___ (not / need) a car.

items.hintDe: can wird im if-Satz zu could; im Hauptsatz steht would not / wouldn't + Grundform.
items.explainDe: can wird zu could (Vergangenheitsform). Die Verneinung im Hauptsatz ist wouldn't / would not + Grundform.

prompt.text: If it ___ (be) sunny, we would go to the park.

items.hintDe: Nach if steht die Vergangenheit. Bei it sind were und was beide möglich.
items.explainDe: Im if-Satz steht das Past simple von be. Bei it/he/she sind hier was und were beide üblich.

prompt.text: Welcher Satz ist richtig gebaut?

answers.text: If I had a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.

distractors: If I have a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.
If I had a dog, I will take it for a walk every day.
If I would have a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.
items.hintDe: if + Vergangenheit (had) und im Hauptsatz would – beides muss stimmen.
items.explainDe: Richtig ist 'If I had a dog, I would take …': if-Satz in der Vergangenheit, Hauptsatz mit would. would im if-Satz oder will sind falsch.

distractorPool: If I have a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.
If I had a dog, I will take it for a walk every day.
If I would have a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.
If I had a dog, I would take it for a walk every day.

prompt.text: Deine Freundin weiß nicht, welches Fach sie nehmen soll. Welcher Rat ist richtig gebaut?

answers.text: If I were you, I would take music.

distractors: If I am you, I will take music.
If I were you, I will take music.
If I would be you, I would take music.
items.hintDe: Rat-Formel: 'If I were you, I would …'.
items.explainDe: Ein Rat heißt 'If I were you, I would take …'. am/will oder 'would be' sind hier falsch.

distractorPool: If I am you, I will take music.
If I were you, I will take music.
If I would be you, I would take music.
If I were you, I would take music.

prompt.text: If I ___ a bird, I would fly to Africa.

items.hintDe: Unwirkliche Situation – nach if steht were.
items.explainDe: Die Situation ist unwirklich, deshalb 'If I were a bird'. am/will be/would be passen nicht in den if-Satz.

distractorPool: am
would be
will be
were

prompt.text: If I would be rich, I would help people.

answers.text: If I were rich, I would help people.
If I was rich, I would help people.

items.hintDe: would gehört NICHT in den if-Satz – dort steht die Vergangenheit.
items.explainDe: Im if-Satz darf kein would stehen. 'If I would be rich' ist falsch – richtig ist 'If I were rich'.

prompt.text: If she studied harder, she will pass the test.

answers.text: If she studied harder, she would pass the test.

items.hintDe: Ein Fehler steckt drin: Welches kleine Wort gehört in den Hauptsatz?
items.explainDe: Bei einer unwahrscheinlichen Situation steht im Hauptsatz would, nicht will: 'she would pass'.

prompt.text: If I have more time, I would read more books.

answers.text: If I had more time, I would read more books.

items.hintDe: Der if-Satz braucht die Vergangenheit, nicht die Gegenwart.
items.explainDe: Nach if steht hier das Past simple: have muss had sein. So wird die Situation unwirklich.

prompt.text: If I was you, I would not worry so much.

answers.text: If I were you, I would not worry so much.

items.hintDe: In der Rat-Formel 'If I … you' steht immer were.
items.explainDe: In der festen Wendung 'If I were you' nimmt man were, nicht was. So gibst du einen Rat.
items.note: single-token swap was->were in fixed 'if I were you'; strict

prompt.text: Echte Situation: 'I don't have a scooter, so I walk to school.' Schreib sie als unwirkliche Bedingung um (beginne mit 'If I …').

answers.text: If I had a scooter, I would not walk to school.
If I had a scooter, I wouldn't walk to school.

items.hintDe: Dreh die echte Situation um: aus 'nicht haben' wird im Gedanken 'hätte', aus 'gehen' wird 'würde nicht gehen'.
items.explainDe: Die unwirkliche Umkehrung: 'If I had a scooter, I would not walk to school.' if-Satz in der Vergangenheit, Hauptsatz mit would not.

prompt.text: She is ill, so she is not at school. (→ 'If she ___')

answers.text: If she were not ill, she would be at school.
If she wasn't ill, she would be at school.
If she were not ill, she'd be at school.

items.hintDe: Die echte Situation umdrehen: aus 'ist krank' wird 'wäre nicht krank', aus 'ist nicht da' wird 'würde da sein'.
items.explainDe: Umkehrung in den 2. Konditional: 'If she weren't ill, she would be at school.' were not / wasn't im if-Satz, would im Hauptsatz.

prompt.text: Wenn ich ein Tier wäre, wäre ich ein Delfin.

answers.text: If I were an animal, I would be a dolphin.
If I was an animal, I would be a dolphin.
If I were an animal, I'd be a dolphin.

items.hintDe: 'wäre' wird hier zweimal anders: im if-Satz were, im Hauptsatz would be.
items.explainDe: 'Wenn ich … wäre' = 'If I were …'; 'wäre ich …' = 'I would be …'. Im Englischen brauchst du im Hauptsatz would.

prompt.text: An deiner Stelle würde ich mir keine Sorgen machen.

answers.text: If I were you, I would not worry.
If I were you, I wouldn't worry.
If I were you, I'd not worry.

items.hintDe: 'An deiner Stelle …' heißt auf Englisch 'If I were you …'.
items.explainDe: 'An deiner Stelle' = 'If I were you'. Danach kommt der Rat mit would (not): 'I would not worry'.

prompt.text: Wenn ich mehr Zeit hätte, würde ich dir helfen.

answers.text: If I had more time, I would help you.
If I had more time, I'd help you.

items.hintDe: 'hätte' = had (Vergangenheit), 'würde helfen' = would help.
items.explainDe: 'Wenn ich … hätte' = 'If I had …'; 'würde ich helfen' = 'I would help'. if-Satz in der Vergangenheit, Hauptsatz mit would.

prompt.text: were / if / you / I / would / I / ask / her

answers.text: If I were you, I would ask her.

items.hintDe: Beginne mit der Rat-Formel 'If I were you, …'.
items.explainDe: Richtige Reihenfolge: 'If I were you, I would ask her.' Erst der if-Satz, dann der Hauptsatz mit would.

distractorPool: will
was
am
they

prompt.text: could / if / I / fly / would / I / travel

answers.text: If I could fly, I would travel.

items.hintDe: can wird zu could; im Hauptsatz steht would + Grundform.
items.explainDe: Richtige Reihenfolge: 'If I could fly, I would travel.' could im if-Satz, would im Hauptsatz.

distractorPool: can
will
was
go

prompt.text: if-Satz und passenden Hauptsatz verbinden

pairs.left: If we lived near the sea,
pairs.right: we would go surfing every day.

items.hintDe: Jeder if-Satz braucht eine sinnvolle Folge mit would.
items.explainDe: Verbinde die Bedingung mit der passenden Folge. In jedem Hauptsatz steht would + Grundform.

prompt.text: Dein Freund sagt: 'I'm so bored at home!' Welche Antwort gibt einen guten Rat und ist richtig gebaut?

answers.text: If I were you, I would join a band.

distractors: If I am you, I will join a band.
If I would be you, I would join a band.
If I were you, I will join a band.
items.hintDe: Rat = 'If I were you, I would …'.
items.explainDe: Der richtige Rat ist 'If I were you, I would join …'. am/will/'would be' sind hier falsch.

distractorPool: If I am you, I will join a band.
If I would be you, I would join a band.
If I were you, I will join a band.
If I were you, I would join a band.

prompt.text: Deine Freundin sagt: 'There is a big spider in my room!' Welche Antwort ist richtig?

answers.text: If I were you, I would put it outside.

distractors: If I were you, I will put it outside.
If I am you, I would put it outside.
If I would be you, I would put it outside.
items.hintDe: if + were, dann would + Grundform – kein will im Hauptsatz, kein would im if-Satz.
items.explainDe: Richtig: 'If I were you, I would put it outside.' Im if-Satz steht were (kein would), im Hauptsatz would (kein will).

distractorPool: If I were you, I will put it outside.
If I am you, I would put it outside.
If I would be you, I would put it outside.
If I were you, I would put it outside.

prompt.text: Welcher Satz ist richtig gebaut, welcher hat einen Fehler?

members: If I had a dog, I would walk it every day.
If I were you, I would ask the teacher.
If she lived here, we would play every day.
If I would have a dog, I would walk it.
If I have a dog, I will walk it every day.
If I were you, I will ask the teacher.

items.hintDe: Richtig = if + Vergangenheit, dann would + Grundform. Falsch = would im if-Satz oder will statt would.
items.explainDe: Richtig sind Sätze mit if + Vergangenheit und would im Hauptsatz. Falsch sind 'If I would have …' und 'If …, I will …'.

prompt.text: Bilde eine Frage über eine unwirkliche Situation: 'you' + 'win a lot of money'. (Beginne mit 'What would you do if …')

answers.text: What would you do if you won a lot of money?

items.hintDe: Frage: 'What would you do if you …' + Vergangenheit.
items.explainDe: Die Frage lautet 'What would you do if you won …?'. Im if-Satz steht das Past simple (won), in der Frage would.

prompt.text: If I ___ (not / be) so tired, I ___ (play) more games.

items.hintDe: Verneinung von be im if-Satz: weren't / wasn't; Hauptsatz mit would.
items.explainDe: Im if-Satz steht die verneinte Vergangenheit (weren't/wasn't), im Hauptsatz would play.

prompt.text: I don't like this song, so I don't listen to it. (→ 'If I ___')

answers.text: If I liked this song, I would listen to it.
If I liked this song, I'd listen to it.

items.hintDe: Aus 'mag nicht' wird 'würde mögen', aus 'höre nicht' wird 'würde hören'.
items.explainDe: Umkehrung: 'If I liked this song, I would listen to it.' like wird zu liked (Vergangenheit), der Hauptsatz nimmt would.

prompt.text: If you ___ (study) more, you would get better marks.  →  Welche Form passt?

items.hintDe: Nach if steht die Vergangenheit, nicht would oder will.
items.explainDe: Im if-Satz steht das Past simple: studied. would/will gehören nicht in den if-Satz.

distractorPool: study
would study
will study
studied

prompt.text: If I were you, I would talked to him.

answers.text: If I were you, I would talk to him.

items.hintDe: Nach would steht die Grundform – nicht die Vergangenheit.
items.explainDe: Nach would kommt die Grundform: 'would talk', nicht 'would talked'.
items.note: single-token swap talked->talk after would; strict

prompt.text: If I ___ (have) a band at school, I ___ (join) it.

items.hintDe: if + Vergangenheit (had), dann would + Grundform (join).
items.explainDe: if-Satz im Past simple (had), Hauptsatz mit would join. Beide Teile zusammen ergeben den 2. Konditional.
